records.m_Talk_ENG: We've arrived, ma'am!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've arrived, ma'am!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've arrived, ma'am!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Corruption rays are too strong that I don't think we can go any further from here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Corruption rays are too strong that I don't think we can go any further from here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Corruption rays are too strong that I don't think we can go any further from here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Good work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Good work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Good work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here's your pay. Think of it as gas money.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here's your pay. Think of it as gas money.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here's your pay. Think of it as gas money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-thank you! Good luck!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-thank you! Good luck!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-thank you! Good luck!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yesterday's enemy is today's ally, huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yesterday's enemy is today's ally, huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yesterday's enemy is today's ally, huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn, guess that's what it means to be a pro mercenary, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn, guess that's what it means to be a pro mercenary, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn, guess that's what it means to be a pro mercenary, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why does she even want to go to such a dangerous place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why does she even want to go to such a dangerous place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why does she even want to go to such a dangerous place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk, tsk. That's why you're still a punk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk, tsk. That's why you're still a punk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk, tsk. That's why you're still a punk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's because the vengeful lonely spider is going to sink her venomous fangs into the Scavengers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's because the vengeful lonely spider is going to sink her venomous fangs into the Scavengers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's because the vengeful lonely spider is going to sink her venomous fangs into the Scavengers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We might soon face a tremendous revenge here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We might soon face a tremendous revenge here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We might soon face a tremendous revenge here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Chorus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Chorus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Chorus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After Jehuty went through the bankruptcy proceedings, I saw related documents while stealing their research material.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After Jehuty went through the bankruptcy proceedings, I saw related documents while stealing their research material.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After Jehuty went through the bankruptcy proceedings, I saw related documents while stealing their research material.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Shadows that controlled Jehuty behind the scenes spent immense capital to salvage the Lost Ship...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Shadows that controlled Jehuty behind the scenes spent immense capital to salvage the Lost Ship...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Shadows that controlled Jehuty behind the scenes spent immense capital to salvage the Lost Ship...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This was originally a ship used in Elysium's world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This was originally a ship used in Elysium's world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This was originally a ship used in Elysium's world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But of course, it can't be used as is because it has been abandoned in the Counterside for all this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But of course, it can't be used as is because it has been abandoned in the Counterside for all this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But of course, it can't be used as is because it has been abandoned in the Counterside for all this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excluding the essential main frame, Jehuty's technology was used extensively to remodel and repair it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excluding the essential main frame, Jehuty's technology was used extensively to remodel and repair it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excluding the essential main frame, Jehuty's technology was used extensively to remodel and repair it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the inevitable problems that arise as a result are...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the inevitable problems that arise as a result are...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the inevitable problems that arise as a result are...

records.m_Talk_ENG: compatibility of parts, non-standardized OS, a reinterpretation of the ship for mass production, and so on...
records.m_Talk_DEU: compatibility of parts, non-standardized OS, a reinterpretation of the ship for mass production, and so on...
records.m_Talk_FRA: compatibility of parts, non-standardized OS, a reinterpretation of the ship for mass production, and so on...

records.m_Talk_ENG: For one reason or another, Chorus has become an entirely different ship after Jehuty got its hands on it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For one reason or another, Chorus has become an entirely different ship after Jehuty got its hands on it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For one reason or another, Chorus has become an entirely different ship after Jehuty got its hands on it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The majority of it now resembles a similar structure to that of the Administration ships.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The majority of it now resembles a similar structure to that of the Administration ships.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The majority of it now resembles a similar structure to that of the Administration ships.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though the ship was built to be operated by Shadows, the engineers who fixed it were from this world after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though the ship was built to be operated by Shadows, the engineers who fixed it were from this world after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though the ship was built to be operated by Shadows, the engineers who fixed it were from this world after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, for instance...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, for instance...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, for instance...

records.m_Talk_ENG: the design of the ship's engine and its main weapon, the high-powered cannon, being connected in series...
records.m_Talk_DEU: the design of the ship's engine and its main weapon, the high-powered cannon, being connected in series...
records.m_Talk_FRA: the design of the ship's engine and its main weapon, the high-powered cannon, being connected in series...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the typical Administration's standard ship designs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the typical Administration's standard ship designs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the typical Administration's standard ship designs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration ships had to support anti-C.O. warfare with high-output and powerful firepower.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration ships had to support anti-C.O. warfare with high-output and powerful firepower.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration ships had to support anti-C.O. warfare with high-output and powerful firepower.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The original Chorus would have never been designed this way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The original Chorus would have never been designed this way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The original Chorus would have never been designed this way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To them, their <color=#ffd34c>special objective</color> of amplifying their members' performance was of more importance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To them, their <color=#ffd34c>special objective</color> of amplifying their members' performance was of more importance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To them, their <color=#ffd34c>special objective</color> of amplifying their members' performance was of more importance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is where the two worlds' technological gap starts to show...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is where the two worlds' technological gap starts to show...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is where the two worlds' technological gap starts to show...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Accordingly, they needed a separate device to bridge the gap between the original Chorus' design and theirs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Accordingly, they needed a separate device to bridge the gap between the original Chorus' design and theirs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Accordingly, they needed a separate device to bridge the gap between the original Chorus' design and theirs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Elysium Shadows had a device that resonated and expanded the reach of the Corruption rays generated by their performing...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Elysium Shadows had a device that resonated and expanded the reach of the Corruption rays generated by their performing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Elysium Shadows had a device that resonated and expanded the reach of the Corruption rays generated by their performing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I'm certain that there must be a <color=#ffd34c>converter</color> that turns the cannon's energy into a different form of energy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I'm certain that there must be a <color=#ffd34c>converter</color> that turns the cannon's energy into a different form of energy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I'm certain that there must be a <color=#ffd34c>converter</color> that turns the cannon's energy into a different form of energy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I can just emulate that converter...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can just emulate that converter...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can just emulate that converter...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The high-powered coordinate signaler, <color=#ffd34c>Lighthouse</color>...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The high-powered coordinate signaler, <color=#ffd34c>Lighthouse</color>...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The high-powered coordinate signaler, <color=#ffd34c>Lighthouse</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying all I have to do is leak the information about this device's existence and location to the Knights of Redemption?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying all I have to do is leak the information about this device's existence and location to the Knights of Redemption?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying all I have to do is leak the information about this device's existence and location to the Knights of Redemption?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You don't need to reveal anything specific, however.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You don't need to reveal anything specific, however.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You don't need to reveal anything specific, however.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let them come up with ways to use it themselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let them come up with ways to use it themselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let them come up with ways to use it themselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, shouldn't you at least tell me what this device is, Commander?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, shouldn't you at least tell me what this device is, Commander?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, shouldn't you at least tell me what this device is, Commander?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Of course, Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Of course, Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Of course, Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Lighthouse is a coordinate signaler made by the Administration to break through the imaginary space.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Lighthouse is a coordinate signaler made by the Administration to break through the imaginary space.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Lighthouse is a coordinate signaler made by the Administration to break through the imaginary space.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Break through the imaginary space...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Break through the imaginary space...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Break through the imaginary space...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: By <color=#ffd34c>expanding</color> the input wavelength with high-output, it provides fixed coordinates to the imaginary space where the coordinates get distorted by the hour.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By <color=#ffd34c>expanding</color> the input wavelength with high-output, it provides fixed coordinates to the imaginary space where the coordinates get distorted by the hour.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By <color=#ffd34c>expanding</color> the input wavelength with high-output, it provides fixed coordinates to the imaginary space where the coordinates get distorted by the hour.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not a bad idea, but it was never implemented due to a flaw.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not a bad idea, but it was never implemented due to a flaw.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not a bad idea, but it was never implemented due to a flaw.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think I know what you're talking about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think I know what you're talking about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think I know what you're talking about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fixing the coordinates in the imaginary space is the same as exposing your location to the C.O.s....
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fixing the coordinates in the imaginary space is the same as exposing your location to the C.O.s....
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fixing the coordinates in the imaginary space is the same as exposing your location to the C.O.s....

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know who made it, but it seems to make the name Lighthouse meaningless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know who made it, but it seems to make the name Lighthouse meaningless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know who made it, but it seems to make the name Lighthouse meaningless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bright as ever, Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bright as ever, Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bright as ever, Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But not all is as it seems. The Lighthouse is still a lighthouse, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But not all is as it seems. The Lighthouse is still a lighthouse, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But not all is as it seems. The Lighthouse is still a lighthouse, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ever heard of the phrase of "perspective shift?" It may be unsuited for humans to find a way...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ever heard of the phrase of "perspective shift?" It may be unsuited for humans to find a way...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ever heard of the phrase of "perspective shift?" It may be unsuited for humans to find a way...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it can show a path to even the blind <color=#ffd34c>losers</color> depending on how one uses it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it can show a path to even the blind <color=#ffd34c>losers</color> depending on how one uses it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it can show a path to even the blind <color=#ffd34c>losers</color> depending on how one uses it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good. The converter is not damaged.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good. The converter is not damaged.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good. The converter is not damaged.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, I'll need a <color=#ffd34c>Qliphoth Factor</color> and a separate <color=#ffd34c>power source</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, I'll need a <color=#ffd34c>Qliphoth Factor</color> and a separate <color=#ffd34c>power source</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, I'll need a <color=#ffd34c>Qliphoth Factor</color> and a separate <color=#ffd34c>power source</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the device has the same principle, I might be able to spread the Qliphoth Factor wavelengths like the Lighthouse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the device has the same principle, I might be able to spread the Qliphoth Factor wavelengths like the Lighthouse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the device has the same principle, I might be able to spread the Qliphoth Factor wavelengths like the Lighthouse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if that's possible...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if that's possible...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if that's possible...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll need to see the converter working with my own eyes to imitate the device's features with Panorama.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll need to see the converter working with my own eyes to imitate the device's features with Panorama.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll need to see the converter working with my own eyes to imitate the device's features with Panorama.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as I expected. The OS is the Administration's standard operating system...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as I expected. The OS is the Administration's standard operating system...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as I expected. The OS is the Administration's standard operating system...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
The engine doesn't have much power, but it's still alive. Maybe
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
The engine doesn't have much power, but it's still alive. Maybe
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
The engine doesn't have much power, but it's still alive. Maybe
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before that... it seems that some unexpected guests have arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before that... it seems that some unexpected guests have arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before that... it seems that some unexpected guests have arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah hah! I was wondering who would dare to mess with our stuff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah hah! I was wondering who would dare to mess with our stuff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah hah! I was wondering who would dare to mess with our stuff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I never thought I'd find a blue rose in a pile of scrap metal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I never thought I'd find a blue rose in a pile of scrap metal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I never thought I'd find a blue rose in a pile of scrap metal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: May I ask for your autograph, senorita?
records.m_Talk_DEU: May I ask for your autograph, senorita?
records.m_Talk_FRA: May I ask for your autograph, senorita?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aside from wanting my autograph, your greeting seems a bit rough, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aside from wanting my autograph, your greeting seems a bit rough, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aside from wanting my autograph, your greeting seems a bit rough, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Scavengers' Rule Number One: Whoever tries to steal from us gets their wrist chopped off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Scavengers' Rule Number One: Whoever tries to steal from us gets their wrist chopped off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Scavengers' Rule Number One: Whoever tries to steal from us gets their wrist chopped off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if that person is a famous celebrity from Charade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if that person is a famous celebrity from Charade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if that person is a famous celebrity from Charade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, instead of your autograph, I'll take that hand of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, instead of your autograph, I'll take that hand of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, instead of your autograph, I'll take that hand of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa. Is this for real? Is that really Swan?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa. Is this for real? Is that really Swan?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa. Is this for real? Is that really Swan?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, man! Look at those long and thin fingers! I can't wait to chop 'em off!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, man! Look at those long and thin fingers! I can't wait to chop 'em off!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, man! Look at those long and thin fingers! I can't wait to chop 'em off!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good timing. I also have a rule of my own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good timing. I also have a rule of my own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good timing. I also have a rule of my own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My rule is that anyone who sees my face behind the stage will not be spared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My rule is that anyone who sees my face behind the stage will not be spared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My rule is that anyone who sees my face behind the stage will not be spared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heh, that's funny.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heh, that's funny.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heh, that's funny.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So please make sure to sing and dance as the lead role will soon appear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So please make sure to sing and dance as the lead role will soon appear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So please make sure to sing and dance as the lead role will soon appear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That will be your roles on the stage called Chorus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That will be your roles on the stage called Chorus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That will be your roles on the stage called Chorus.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration ships had to support anti-C.O. warfare with high-output and powerful firepower.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration ships had to support anti-C.O. warfare with high-output and powerful firepower.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration ships had to support anti-C.O. warfare with high-output and powerful firepower.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The original Chorus would have never been designed this way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The original Chorus would have never been designed this way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The original Chorus would have never been designed this way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To them, their <color=#ffd34c>special objective</color> of amplifying their members' performance was of more importance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To them, their <color=#ffd34c>special objective</color> of amplifying their members' performance was of more importance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To them, their <color=#ffd34c>special objective</color> of amplifying their members' performance was of more importance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is where the two worlds' technological gap starts to show...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is where the two worlds' technological gap starts to show...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is where the two worlds' technological gap starts to show...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Accordingly, they needed a separate device to bridge the gap between the original Chorus' design and theirs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Accordingly, they needed a separate device to bridge the gap between the original Chorus' design and theirs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Accordingly, they needed a separate device to bridge the gap between the original Chorus' design and theirs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Elysium Shadows had a device that resonated and expanded the reach of the Corruption rays generated by their performing...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Elysium Shadows had a device that resonated and expanded the reach of the Corruption rays generated by their performing...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Elysium Shadows had a device that resonated and expanded the reach of the Corruption rays generated by their performing...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, I'm certain that there must be a <color=#ffd34c>converter</color> that turns the cannon's energy into a different form of energy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, I'm certain that there must be a <color=#ffd34c>converter</color> that turns the cannon's energy into a different form of energy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I'm certain that there must be a <color=#ffd34c>converter</color> that turns the cannon's energy into a different form of energy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I can just emulate that converter...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I can just emulate that converter...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I can just emulate that converter...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The high-powered coordinate signaler, <color=#ffd34c>Lighthouse</color>...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The high-powered coordinate signaler, <color=#ffd34c>Lighthouse</color>...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The high-powered coordinate signaler, <color=#ffd34c>Lighthouse</color>...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying all I have to do is leak the information about this device's existence and location to the Knights of Redemption?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying all I have to do is leak the information about this device's existence and location to the Knights of Redemption?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying all I have to do is leak the information about this device's existence and location to the Knights of Redemption?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You don't need to reveal anything specific, however.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You don't need to reveal anything specific, however.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You don't need to reveal anything specific, however.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let them come up with ways to use it themselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let them come up with ways to use it themselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let them come up with ways to use it themselves.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, shouldn't you at least tell me what this device is, Commander?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, shouldn't you at least tell me what this device is, Commander?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, shouldn't you at least tell me what this device is, Commander?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Of course, Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Of course, Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Of course, Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Lighthouse is a coordinate signaler made by the Administration to break through the imaginary space.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Lighthouse is a coordinate signaler made by the Administration to break through the imaginary space.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Lighthouse is a coordinate signaler made by the Administration to break through the imaginary space.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Break through the imaginary space...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Break through the imaginary space...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Break through the imaginary space...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: By <color=#ffd34c>expanding</color> the input wavelength with high-output, it provides fixed coordinates to the imaginary space where the coordinates get distorted by the hour.
root.m_Talk_DEU: By <color=#ffd34c>expanding</color> the input wavelength with high-output, it provides fixed coordinates to the imaginary space where the coordinates get distorted by the hour.
root.m_Talk_FRA: By <color=#ffd34c>expanding</color> the input wavelength with high-output, it provides fixed coordinates to the imaginary space where the coordinates get distorted by the hour.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not a bad idea, but it was never implemented due to a flaw.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not a bad idea, but it was never implemented due to a flaw.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not a bad idea, but it was never implemented due to a flaw.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think I know what you're talking about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think I know what you're talking about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think I know what you're talking about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fixing the coordinates in the imaginary space is the same as exposing your location to the C.O.s....
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fixing the coordinates in the imaginary space is the same as exposing your location to the C.O.s....
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fixing the coordinates in the imaginary space is the same as exposing your location to the C.O.s....

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know who made it, but it seems to make the name Lighthouse meaningless.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know who made it, but it seems to make the name Lighthouse meaningless.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know who made it, but it seems to make the name Lighthouse meaningless.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bright as ever, Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bright as ever, Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bright as ever, Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But not all is as it seems. The Lighthouse is still a lighthouse, after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But not all is as it seems. The Lighthouse is still a lighthouse, after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But not all is as it seems. The Lighthouse is still a lighthouse, after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ever heard of the phrase of "perspective shift?" It may be unsuited for humans to find a way...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ever heard of the phrase of "perspective shift?" It may be unsuited for humans to find a way...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ever heard of the phrase of "perspective shift?" It may be unsuited for humans to find a way...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it can show a path to even the blind <color=#ffd34c>losers</color> depending on how one uses it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it can show a path to even the blind <color=#ffd34c>losers</color> depending on how one uses it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it can show a path to even the blind <color=#ffd34c>losers</color> depending on how one uses it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good. The converter is not damaged.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good. The converter is not damaged.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good. The converter is not damaged.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, I'll need a <color=#ffd34c>Qliphoth Factor</color> and a separate <color=#ffd34c>power source</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, I'll need a <color=#ffd34c>Qliphoth Factor</color> and a separate <color=#ffd34c>power source</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, I'll need a <color=#ffd34c>Qliphoth Factor</color> and a separate <color=#ffd34c>power source</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the device has the same principle, I might be able to spread the Qliphoth Factor wavelengths like the Lighthouse.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the device has the same principle, I might be able to spread the Qliphoth Factor wavelengths like the Lighthouse.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the device has the same principle, I might be able to spread the Qliphoth Factor wavelengths like the Lighthouse.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if that's possible...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if that's possible...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if that's possible...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll need to see the converter working with my own eyes to imitate the device's features with Panorama.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll need to see the converter working with my own eyes to imitate the device's features with Panorama.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll need to see the converter working with my own eyes to imitate the device's features with Panorama.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as I expected. The OS is the Administration's standard operating system...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as I expected. The OS is the Administration's standard operating system...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as I expected. The OS is the Administration's standard operating system...

root.m_Talk_ENG:
The engine doesn't have much power, but it's still alive. Maybe
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
The engine doesn't have much power, but it's still alive. Maybe
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
The engine doesn't have much power, but it's still alive. Maybe

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before that... it seems that some unexpected guests have arrived.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before that... it seems that some unexpected guests have arrived.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before that... it seems that some unexpected guests have arrived.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah hah! I was wondering who would dare to mess with our stuff.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah hah! I was wondering who would dare to mess with our stuff.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah hah! I was wondering who would dare to mess with our stuff.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I never thought I'd find a blue rose in a pile of scrap metal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I never thought I'd find a blue rose in a pile of scrap metal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I never thought I'd find a blue rose in a pile of scrap metal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: May I ask for your autograph, senorita?
root.m_Talk_DEU: May I ask for your autograph, senorita?
root.m_Talk_FRA: May I ask for your autograph, senorita?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aside from wanting my autograph, your greeting seems a bit rough, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aside from wanting my autograph, your greeting seems a bit rough, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aside from wanting my autograph, your greeting seems a bit rough, don't you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Scavengers' Rule Number One: Whoever tries to steal from us gets their wrist chopped off.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Scavengers' Rule Number One: Whoever tries to steal from us gets their wrist chopped off.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Scavengers' Rule Number One: Whoever tries to steal from us gets their wrist chopped off.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if that person is a famous celebrity from Charade.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if that person is a famous celebrity from Charade.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if that person is a famous celebrity from Charade.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, instead of your autograph, I'll take that hand of yours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, instead of your autograph, I'll take that hand of yours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, instead of your autograph, I'll take that hand of yours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa. Is this for real? Is that really Swan?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa. Is this for real? Is that really Swan?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa. Is this for real? Is that really Swan?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, man! Look at those long and thin fingers! I can't wait to chop 'em off!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, man! Look at those long and thin fingers! I can't wait to chop 'em off!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, man! Look at those long and thin fingers! I can't wait to chop 'em off!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good timing. I also have a rule of my own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good timing. I also have a rule of my own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good timing. I also have a rule of my own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My rule is that anyone who sees my face behind the stage will not be spared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My rule is that anyone who sees my face behind the stage will not be spared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My rule is that anyone who sees my face behind the stage will not be spared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heh, that's funny.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heh, that's funny.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heh, that's funny.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So please make sure to sing and dance as the lead role will soon appear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So please make sure to sing and dance as the lead role will soon appear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So please make sure to sing and dance as the lead role will soon appear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That will be your roles on the stage called Chorus.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That will be your roles on the stage called Chorus.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That will be your roles on the stage called Chorus.
